auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Zixflow API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in Workspace Settings under Developer > API Keys: https://docs.zixflow.com/api-reference/introduction.

actions.name: create_collection_record
actions.description: Create a dynamic record in a Zixflow collection.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

record.description: A dynamic Zixflow collection record with fields defined by the collection attributes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a collection record mutation.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

recordId.description: The unique identifier of the created collection record.

record.description: A dynamic Zixflow collection record with fields defined by the collection attributes.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a Zixflow collection record.

actions.name: create_list_entry
actions.description: Create a dynamic entry in a Zixflow list.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

entry.description: A dynamic Zixflow list entry with fields defined by the list attributes.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a list entry mutation.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

entryId.description: The unique identifier of the created list entry.

entry.description: A dynamic Zixflow list entry with fields defined by the list attributes.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a Zixflow list entry.

actions.name: delete_collection_record
actions.description: Delete a dynamic record from a Zixflow collection.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

recordId.description: The unique identifier of the collection record.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a Zixflow collection record.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The status wrapper returned by Zixflow.

actions.name: delete_list_entry
actions.description: Delete a dynamic entry from a Zixflow list.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

entryId.description: The unique identifier of the list entry.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a Zixflow list entry.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The status wrapper returned by Zixflow.

actions.name: get_collection
actions.description: Get one Zixflow collection by ID.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Zixflow collection.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

collectionType.description: The collection type such as people, company, deals, or custom.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Zixflow collection.

actions.name: get_collection_record
actions.description: Get one dynamic record from a Zixflow collection.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

recordId.description: The unique identifier of the collection record.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Zixflow collection record.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

record.description: A dynamic Zixflow collection record with fields defined by the collection attributes.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Zixflow collection record.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Get one Zixflow list by ID.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Zixflow list.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the list.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection backing this list.

duplicationAllowed.description: Whether the list allows duplicate records.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Zixflow list.

actions.name: get_list_entry
actions.description: Get one dynamic entry from a Zixflow list.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

entryId.description: The unique identifier of the list entry.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Zixflow list entry.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

entry.description: A dynamic Zixflow list entry with fields defined by the list attributes.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Zixflow list entry.

actions.name: get_workspace_member
actions.description: Get one Zixflow workspace member by ID.

memberId.description: The unique identifier of the workspace member.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a Zixflow workspace member.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the workspace member.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Zixflow workspace member.

actions.name: list_collections
actions.description: List system and custom collections in the Zixflow workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Zixflow collections.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

collectionType.description: The collection type such as people, company, deals, or custom.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Zixflow collections.

actions.name: list_lists
actions.description: List Zixflow lists in the workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Zixflow lists.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the list.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection backing this list.

duplicationAllowed.description: Whether the list allows duplicate records.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Zixflow lists.

actions.name: list_workspace_members
actions.description: List members in the Zixflow workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Zixflow workspace members.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the workspace member.

members.description: The workspace members returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Zixflow workspace members.

actions.name: query_collection_records
actions.description: Query records from a Zixflow collection using the official filter and paging body.

collectionId.description: The unique identifier of the collection.

limit.description: Maximum number of records or entries to return.

offset.description: Number of records or entries to skip before returning results.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for querying Zixflow collection records.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

items.description: A dynamic Zixflow collection record with fields defined by the collection attributes.

records.description: The collection records returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when querying Zixflow collection records.

actions.name: query_list_entries
actions.description: Query entries from a Zixflow list using the official filter and paging body.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

limit.description: Maximum number of records or entries to return.

offset.description: Number of records or entries to skip before returning results.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for querying Zixflow list entries.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

items.description: A dynamic Zixflow list entry with fields defined by the list attributes.

entries.description: The list entries returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when querying Zixflow list entries.

actions.name: update_collection_record
actions.description: Update a dynamic record in a Zixflow collection.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The status wrapper returned by Zixflow.

actions.name: update_list_entry
actions.description: Update a dynamic entry in a Zixflow list.

listId.description: The unique identifier of the list.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a Zixflow list entry.

status.description: Whether Zixflow reports the request as successful.

message.description: The human-readable message returned by Zixflow.

outputSchema.description: The status wrapper returned by Zixflow.
